action_completed: Aligned the evidence manifest verifier with builder schema 1.1.0 and added downgrade rejection coverage.

observed: The verifier previously accepted only schema 1.0.0.
The mismatch made final evidence verification fail closed for every newly built manifest.
inferred: A credentialed deployment run could not complete evidence finalization until the schema contract was aligned.
proposed: Run the full workflow after Cloudflare environment credentials are configured and retain the provider-returned deployment identity.

verification.route: isolated Node execution with byte-identical implementation logic

privacy_boundary: Public repository evidence only; no credentials, private chat, health material, or personal identifiers.
next_action: Configure the cloudflare-research GitHub environment, dispatch the workflow, and verify that finalization now accepts the schema 1.1.0 manifest before requiring resolving URL, served identity, and deployed-commit proof.
